creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
I propose the following commit log message:

Resurrect, update and adopt misc/xiphos

Resurrect the port and update it from 3.1.6 to a git commit after last release (4.1.0). The commit was selected so that the port does not depend on python 2.7.
Resurrection is possible because the dependency on webkit-gtk3 in the expired version has been replaced by a dependency on webkit2-gtk3.
